ValidationRule.description: Ensures Date Type is selected and the corresponding date field is populated. Exactly one date type may govern billing per line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Date_Type__c)), AND(ISPICKVAL(Date_Type__c, 'Calendar'), ISBLANK(Calendar_Date__c)), AND(ISPICKVAL(Date_Type__c, 'Broadcast'), ISBLANK(Broadcast_Date__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Select a Date Type and populate the matching date field. Calendar Date is required when Date Type is Calendar; Broadcast Date is required when Date Type is Broadcast.
